prompt: Describe the image in a long, detailed paragraph. Be thorough and cover the main subject, the setting, all visible objects, actions, spatial relationships, colors, and contextual details. Aim for a rich, complete description of the scene.

baseline.caption_ref: The image features an assortment of teddy bears gathered together on top of a bed or couch. There are at least five different teddy bears present in various positions within the scene. Some of them appear to be sitting close to each other while others are spread out across the surface. One teddy bear is situated towards the left side of the frame, another one can be found near the center, and two more are positioned closer to the right edge of the image. Overall, it's a cozy and inviting scene with these stuffed animals arranged comfortably.
